--- a//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/state/app_state.rs
+++ b//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/state/app_state.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,193 @@
+use parking_lot::Mutex;
+use std::collections::HashMap;
+use std::sync::Arc;
+use tauri::ipc::Channel;
+use tokio::sync::oneshot;
+use vofa_next_buffer::{DataBuffer, RawDataCollector};
+use vofa_next_core::{
+    CanBuffer, CanLoadStats, DecodedBuffer, LogicBuffer, ProtocolConfig,
+};
+use vofa_next_dsp::{DigitalFilter, SpectrumAnalyzer, SpectrumResult};
+use vofa_next_nodes::{CompiledGraph, FrameParser};
+use vofa_next_protocol::ProtocolEngine;
+use vofa_next_transport::TransportManager;
+
+/// 单个图输出快照 — 通过 Channel 推送到前端
+///
+/// values: widgetId -> portId -> value
+/// 包含 ChannelSource/Input/Math/Custom/Filter 节点的输出
+/// 前端通过 edges 自行解析 Sink 节点的输入 (上游 widgetId + sourceHandle)
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
+pub struct GraphOutputSnapshot {
+    /// 自增计数器, 前端可用于去重/丢弃过期帧
+    pub tick: u64,
+    /// widgetId -> portId -> value
+    pub values: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, f32>>,
+}
+
+/// Custom widget 输入批次 — 后端推送到前端 iframe
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
+pub struct CustomInputBatch {
+    /// custom widget id -> input port id -> value
+    pub inputs: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, f32>>,
+}
+
+/// 频谱分析结果批次 — 后端推送到前端 SpectrumChart
+///
+/// 30 FPS 推送, key = SpectrumSink widget id, value = 最新一次 FFT 结果
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
+pub struct SpectrumBatch {
+    /// sink widget id -> 频谱结果
+    pub spectra: HashMap<String, SpectrumResult>,
+}
+
+/// 节点图评估所需的共享状态 (从 AppState 抽取, 供 data_loop 使用)
+///
+/// 设计动机: Tauri 2 的 State<'_, T> 内部是 &Arc<T> 但不暴露 Arc,
+/// 我们也无法在 manage() 时包装 AppState 成 Arc<AppState> (因为 tauri::manage
+/// 内部已用 Arc)。因此把 data_loop 需要的字段单独打包为 Arc, 从 AppState 克隆。
+pub struct GraphEvalState {
+    pub graphs: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, CompiledGraph>>>,
+    pub input_values: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, f32>>>,
+    pub custom_outputs: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, HashMap<String, f32>>>>,
+    pub output_snapshot: Arc<Mutex<GraphOutputSnapshot>>,
+    pub output_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<GraphOutputSnapshot>>>>,
+    pub custom_input_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<CustomInputBatch>>>>,
+    /// Filter 节点状态 (跨帧持久化, 逐点滤波)
+    /// key: Filter widget id, value: DigitalFilter (含 FIR 延迟线 / IIR biquad 状态)
+    pub filter_states: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, DigitalFilter>>>,
+    /// FrameDecoder 节点状态 (跨帧持久化, 字节流解析状态机)
+    /// key: FrameDecoder widget id, value: FrameParser (含 buf/state/last_frame)
+    /// 由 data_loop 在每包数据上调用 feed_frame_decoders 同步并喂入字节
+    pub decoder_states: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, FrameParser>>>,
+    /// SpectrumSink 节点对应的频谱分析器
+    /// key: SpectrumSink widget id, value: SpectrumAnalyzer (含滑动窗口)
+    /// 由 spectrum_ticker 在每 tick 开头与 graphs 同步 (增删)
+    pub spectrum_analyzers: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, SpectrumAnalyzer>>>,
+    /// 最新一次 FFT 结果 (供 30 FPS spectrum_ticker 推送)
+    /// key: SpectrumSink widget id, value: SpectrumResult
+    pub spectrum_snapshot: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, SpectrumResult>>>,
+    /// 频谱订阅者 (30 FPS 推送 SpectrumBatch)
+    pub spectrum_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<SpectrumBatch>>>>,
+}
+
+/// 应用全局状态
+pub struct AppState {
+    /// 传输管理器 (async mutex, 因为 open/send 是异步的)
+    pub transport: tokio::sync::Mutex<TransportManager>,
+    /// 协议引擎 (sync mutex, feed/encode 是同步的)
+    pub protocol: Arc<Mutex<Box<dyn ProtocolEngine>>>,
+    /// 当前协议配置
+    pub protocol_config: Mutex<ProtocolConfig>,
+    /// 多通道数据缓冲区
+    pub buffer: Arc<Mutex<DataBuffer>>,
+    /// 节点图 — 按 tab_id 索引 (每个 tab 独立编译图)
+    pub graphs: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, CompiledGraph>>>,
+    /// 输入控件当前值 (Knob/Slider/Button/Radio/Checkbox)
+    /// key: widget_id, value: 当前值
+    /// 由前端 invoke('set_input_value') 更新
+    pub input_values: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, f32>>>,
+    /// Custom widget 回传输出
+    /// key: widget_id, value: portId -> value
+    /// 由前端 invoke('submit_custom_output') 更新
+    pub custom_outputs: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, HashMap<String, f32>>>>,
+    /// 最新一帧的图输出快照 (供 60 FPS ticker 推送)
+    pub output_snapshot: Arc<Mutex<GraphOutputSnapshot>>,
+    /// 图输出订阅者 (60 FPS 推送)
+    pub output_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<GraphOutputSnapshot>>>>,
+    /// Custom 输入订阅者 (30 FPS 推送到前端 iframe)
+    pub custom_input_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<CustomInputBatch>>>>,
+    /// Filter 节点状态 (跨帧持久化)
+    pub filter_states: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, DigitalFilter>>>,
+    /// FrameDecoder 节点状态 (跨帧持久化)
+    pub decoder_states: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, FrameParser>>>,
+    /// SpectrumSink 节点对应的频谱分析器
+    pub spectrum_analyzers: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, SpectrumAnalyzer>>>,
+    /// 最新一次 FFT 结果快照
+    pub spectrum_snapshot: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<String, SpectrumResult>>>,
+    /// 频谱订阅者 (30 FPS 推送)
+    pub spectrum_subscribers: Arc<Mutex<Vec<Channel<SpectrumBatch>>>>,
+    /// 波形订阅任务的取消句柄 — key: channel_id, value: oneshot sender
+    /// 前端调用 unsubscribe_waveform 时, 通过 channel_id 取出 sender 发送取消信号,
+    /// 让 tokio::spawn 的 task 优雅退出, 避免向已关闭的 channel send 产生警告。
+    pub waveform_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+    /// 原始数据收集器
+    pub raw_data_collector: Arc<Mutex<RawDataCollector>>,
+    /// 原始数据订阅任务的取消句柄
+    pub raw_data_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+    /// CAN 帧缓冲区
+    pub can_buffer: Arc<Mutex<CanBuffer>>,
+    /// CAN 负载统计器 (滑动窗口)
+    pub can_load_stats: Arc<Mutex<CanLoadStats>>,
+    /// CAN 负载统计订阅任务的取消句柄 — key: channel_id
+    pub can_load_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+    /// CAN 订阅任务的取消句柄 — key: channel_id
+    pub can_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+    /// 逻辑采样缓冲区
+    pub logic_buffer: Arc<Mutex<LogicBuffer>>,
+    /// 解码事件缓冲区
+    pub decoded_buffer: Arc<Mutex<DecodedBuffer>>,
+    /// 逻辑采样订阅任务的取消句柄
+    pub logic_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+    /// 解码事件订阅任务的取消句柄
+    pub decoded_tasks: Arc<Mutex<HashMap<u32, oneshot::Sender<()>>>>,
+}
+
+impl AppState {
+    pub fn new() -> Self {
+        Self {
+            transport: tokio::sync::Mutex::new(TransportManager::new()),
+            protocol: Arc::new(Mutex::new(vofa_next_protocol::create_engine(&ProtocolConfig::default()))),
+            protocol_config: Mutex::new(ProtocolConfig::default()),
+            buffer: Arc::new(Mutex::new(DataBuffer::new(100_000, 4))),
+            graphs: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            input_values: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            custom_outputs: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            output_snapshot: Arc::new(Mutex::new(GraphOutputSnapshot {
+                tick: 0,
+                values: HashMap::new(),
+            })),
+            output_subscribers: Arc::new(Mutex::new(Vec::new())),
+            custom_input_subscribers: Arc::new(Mutex::new(Vec::new())),
+            filter_states: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            decoder_states: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            spectrum_analyzers: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            spectrum_snapshot: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            spectrum_subscribers: Arc::new(Mutex::new(Vec::new())),
+            waveform_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            raw_data_collector: Arc::new(Mutex::new(RawDataCollector::new())),
+            raw_data_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            can_buffer: Arc::new(Mutex::new(CanBuffer::new(100_000))),
+            can_load_stats: Arc::new(Mutex::new(CanLoadStats::new(1_000_000, 120))),
+            can_load_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            can_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            logic_buffer: Arc::new(Mutex::new(LogicBuffer::new(20_000))),
+            decoded_buffer: Arc::new(Mutex::new(DecodedBuffer::new(10_000))),
+            logic_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+            decoded_tasks: Arc::new(Mutex::new(HashMap::new())),
+        }
+    }
+
+    /// 抽取图评估所需的 Arc 字段 (供 data_loop 持有)
+    pub fn eval_state(&self) -> GraphEvalState {
+        GraphEvalState {
+            graphs: self.graphs.clone(),
+            input_values: self.input_values.clone(),
+            custom_outputs: self.custom_outputs.clone(),
+            output_snapshot: self.output_snapshot.clone(),
+            output_subscribers: self.output_subscribers.clone(),
+            custom_input_subscribers: self.custom_input_subscribers.clone(),
+            filter_states: self.filter_states.clone(),
+            decoder_states: self.decoder_states.clone(),
+            spectrum_analyzers: self.spectrum_analyzers.clone(),
+            spectrum_snapshot: self.spectrum_snapshot.clone(),
+            spectrum_subscribers: self.spectrum_subscribers.clone(),
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+impl Default for AppState {
+    fn default() -> Self {
+        Self::new()
+    }
+}

   354│ /// 推送的是缓冲区快照 (get_recent), 与 data_loop 的实时 emit 互补:
   355│ /// - data_loop emit "transport:can-frames": 实时批次 (适合需要逐帧处理的场景)
   356│ /// - can_frames_loop via Channel: 周期性快照 (适合 UI 列表展示, 控制刷新频率)
   357│ pub async fn can_frames_loop(
   358│     buffer: Arc<Mutex<CanBuffer>>,
   359│     on_event: Channel<CanFrameBatch>,
   360│     interval: Duration,
   361│     max_frames: usize,
   362│     cancel_rx: oneshot::Receiver<()>,
   363│ ) {

   365│     let mut cancel_rx = cancel_rx;

   367│         tokio::select! {
   368│             _ = &mut cancel_rx => break,
   369│             _ = ticker.tick() => {

   371│                     let buf = buffer.lock();
   372│                     buf.get_recent(max_frames)
   373│                 };
   374│                 if on_event.send(CanFrameBatch { frames }).is_err() {
   375│                     break;
   376│                 }
   377│             }
   378│         }
   379│     }
   380│ }

```rust
pub async fn graph_output_ticker(state: GraphEvalState) {
    log::info!("图输出 ticker 已启动 (60 FPS)");
    let mut ticker = tokio::time::interval(std::time::Duration::from_millis(16));
    ticker.set_missed_tick_behavior(tokio::time::MissedTickBehavior::Skip);

    loop {
        ticker.tick().await;
        let snap = state.output_snapshot.lock().clone();
        let mut subs = state.output_subscribers.lock();
        subs.retain(|ch| ch.send(snap.clone()).is_ok());
    }
}
```

   323│     !current_configs.is_empty()
   324│ }
   325│ 
   326│ /// 数据循环 — 快速消费传输层 broadcast, 转发到解析 task
   327│ ///
   328│ /// 架构 (节点图后端化重构):
   329│ /// - data_loop (本函数): 只做 recv + mpsc.send, 最快消费 broadcast 避免 Lagged
   330│ /// - parse_task: 从 mpsc 收数据, 做 协议解析 + buffer.push + 图评估 + 批量 emit
   331│ ///   - 批量 emit: `transport:frames` (数组) 替代每帧一次 `transport:frame`
   332│ ///   - 统计节流: STATS_THROTTLE_MS 内累积, 一次性 emit
   333│ ///   - 图评估: 调用 evaluate_all_graphs_with 实时计算所有节点输出
   334│ ///     结果存入 output_snapshot, 由独立的 60 FPS ticker task 推送到前端
   335│ pub async fn data_loop(
   336│     app: AppHandle,
   337│     mut rx: tokio::sync::broadcast::Receiver<Vec<u8>>,
   338│     protocol: Arc<Mutex<Box<dyn ProtocolEngine>>>,
   339│     buffer: Arc<Mutex<DataBuffer>>,
   340│     eval_state: GraphEvalState,
   341│     raw_data_collector: Arc<Mutex<RawDataCollector>>,
   342│     can_buffer: Arc<Mutex<CanBuffer>>,
   343│     can_load_stats: Arc<Mutex<CanLoadStats>>,
   344│     logic_buffer: Arc<Mutex<LogicBuffer>>,
   345│     decoded_buffer: Arc<Mutex<DecodedBuffer>>,
   346│ ) {
   347│     log::info!("数据循环已启动");
   348│ 
   349│     // 解析 task 用的 mpsc (大容量缓冲, 避免反压到 data_loop)
   350│     let (parse_tx, mut parse_rx) = mpsc::channel::<Vec<u8>>(2048);
   351│     let app2 = app.clone();
   352│     let proto2 = protocol.clone();
   353│     let buf2 = buffer.clone();
   354│     let eval2 = eval_state;
   355│     let raw_collector2 = raw_data_collector;
   356│     let can_buffer2 = can_buffer;
   357│     let can_load_stats2 = can_load_stats;
   358│     let logic_buffer2 = logic_buffer;
   359│     let decoded_buffer2 = decoded_buffer;
   360│ 
   361│     let parse_task = tokio::spawn(async move {
   362│         let mut detection_notified = false;
   363│         let mut frame_batch: Vec<DataFrame> = Vec::with_capacity(128);
   364│         let mut last_stats = Instant::now();
   365│         let mut acc_bytes: u64 = 0;
   366│         let mut acc_frames: u64 = 0;
   367│ 
   368│         while let Some(data) = parse_rx.recv().await {
   369│             // 1. 收集原始数据 (通过 Channel 周期性推送, 替代每包 emit)
   370│             raw_collector2.lock().push_chunk(now_us(), &data);
   371│ 
   372│             // 2. 协议解析
   373│             let frames = proto2.lock().feed(&data);
   374│             acc_bytes += data.len() as u64;
   375│             acc_frames += frames.len() as u64;
   376│ 
   377│             // 2.x CAN 帧解析 (slcan/candleLight) — 非 CAN 协议返回空 Vec
   378│             let can_frames = proto2.lock().feed_can(&data);
   379│             if !can_frames.is_empty() {
   380│                 // push 到 can_buffer
   381│                 {
   382│                     let mut buf = can_buffer2.lock();
   383│                     for f in &can_frames {
   384│                         buf.push(f.clone());
   385│                     }
   386│                 }
   387│                 // push 到负载统计器 (仅统计 Rx 方向, 避免发送帧重复计入)
   388│                 {
   389│                     let mut stats = can_load_stats2.lock();
   390│                     for f in &can_frames {
   391│                         if f.direction == vofa_next_core::CanDirection::Rx {
   392│                             stats.push(f);
   393│                         }
   394│                     }
   395│                 }
   396│                 // emit 批次事件 (实时推送到前端, 供监听 transport:can-frames 的组件使用)
   397│                 let _ = app2.emit(
   398│                     "transport:can-frames",
   399│                     &CanFrameBatch { frames: can_frames.clone() },
   400│                 );
   401│             }
   402│ 
   403│             // 2.x 逻辑采样 + 解码事件 (LogicDecoder 协议)
   404│             let logic_samples = proto2.lock().feed_logic(&data);
   405│             if !logic_samples.is_empty() {
   406│                 {
   407│                     let mut lb = logic_buffer2.lock();
   408│                     for s in &logic_samples {
   409│                         lb.push(s.clone());
   410│                     }
   411│                 }
   412│                 let _ = app2.emit(
   413│                     "transport:logic-samples",
   414│                     &LogicSampleBatch { samples: logic_samples },
   415│                 );
   416│             }
   417│             let decoded_events = proto2.lock().feed_decoded(&data);
   418│             if !decoded_events.is_empty() {
   419│                 {
   420│                     let mut db = decoded_buffer2.lock();
   421│                     for e in &decoded_events {
   422│                         db.push(e.clone());
   423│                     }
   424│                 }
   425│                 let _ = app2.emit(
   426│                     "transport:decoded-events",
   427│                     &DecodedEventBatch { events: decoded_events },
   428│                 );
   429│             }
   430│ 
   431│             // 2.1 自动通道检测通知 (一次性)
   432│             if !detection_notified {
   433│                 let p = proto2.lock();
   434│                 if p.is_auto_mode() {
   435│                     if let Some(n) = p.detected_channels() {
   436│                         crate::notify::channels_detected(&app2, n);
   437│                         detection_notified = true;
   438│                     }
   439│                 }
   440│             }
   441│ 
   442│             // 2.2 帧解码器: 喂入原始字节, 更新 decoder_states.last_frame
   443│             //     必须在 evaluate 之前完成, evaluate 阶段从 last_frame 读取输出
   444│             //     返回 has_decoders: 是否存在 FrameDecoder 节点 (供 frames 空时决策)
   445│             let has_decoders = feed_frame_decoders(&eval2, &data, now_us());
   446│ 
   447│             // 3. 推入缓冲区 + 评估节点图 + 收集派生值 (每帧实时计算)
   448│             //    三步必须在同一帧内顺序执行, 保证 derived 与 timestamps 对齐
   449│             if !frames.is_empty() {
   450│                 for f in &frames {
   451│                     // 3.1 push 原始帧到 buffer
   452│                     {
   453│                         let mut buf = buf2.lock();
   454│                         buf.push_frame(f);
   455│                     }
   456│                     // 3.2 评估所有 tab 的图, 更新 output_snapshot
   457│                     //     (ticker task 会按 60 FPS 推送到前端)
   458│                     evaluate_all_graphs_with(&eval2, f);
   459│                     // 3.3 从 snapshot 收集派生值, push 到 buffer.derived_buffers
   460│                     //     与本帧 push_frame 的时间戳对齐
   461│                     {
   462│                         let mut buf = buf2.lock();
   463│                         push_derived_from_snapshot(&eval2, &mut buf);
   464│                     }
   465│                 }
   466│                 frame_batch.extend(frames);
   467│             } else if has_decoders {
   468│                 // RawData 等协议下 frames 为空, 但 FrameDecoder 节点存在时
   469│                 // 仍需 evaluate 一次以更新 output_snapshot (decoder 输出来自 last_frame 缓存)
   470│                 evaluate_all_graphs_with(&eval2, &DataFrame::new(vec![]));
   471│                 // 不 push_derived (无 push_frame, 时间戳未对齐)
   472│             }
   473│ 
   474│             // 4. 批量 emit 帧 (一次 IPC 替代 N 次)
   475│             if !frame_batch.is_empty() {
   476│                 let _ = app2.emit("transport:frames", &frame_batch);
   477│                 frame_batch.clear();
   478│             }
   479│ 
   480│             // 5. 统计节流 emit
   481│             let now = Instant::now();
   482│             if now.duration_since(last_stats).as_millis() >= STATS_THROTTLE_MS {
   483│                 let _ = app2.emit(
   484│                     "transport:rx",
   485│                     &TransportStats {
   486│                         rx_bytes: acc_bytes,
   487│                         rx_frames: acc_frames,
   488│                         tx_bytes: 0,
   489│                         tx_frames: 0,
   490│                     },
   491│                 );
   492│                 acc_bytes = 0;
   493│                 acc_frames = 0;
   494│                 last_stats = now;
   495│             }
   496│         }
   497│ 
   498│         // mpsc 关闭 → 传输已断开
   499│         let _ = app2.emit("transport:state", ConnectionState::Disconnected);
   500│         log::info!("解析任务已退出");
   501│     });
   502│ 
   503│     // data_loop: 快速消费 broadcast, 转发到 mpsc (不阻塞在 emit/解析上)

   505│         match rx.recv().await {

   508│                     log::info!("解析任务已退出, 停止数据循环");
   509│                     break;
   510│                 }
   511│             }
   512│             Err(tokio::sync::broadcast::error::RecvError::Closed) => {
   513│                 log::info!("数据广播通道已关闭");
   514│                 break;
   515│             }
   516│             Err(tokio::sync::broadcast::error::RecvError::Lagged(n)) => {
   517│                 log::warn!("数据广播落后 {} 条", n);
   518│             }
   519│         }
   520│     }
   521│ 
   522│     // 关闭 mpsc, 等待解析 task 刷完剩余数据

   524│     let _ = parse_task.await;

   526│ }
   527│

   529│ ///
   530│ /// 订阅者通过 invoke('subscribe_graph_outputs', on_event: Channel) 加入

<file path="/Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/commands.rs" total_lines="1149" shown_lines="720-1149" truncated="true">
   720│ 
   721│ /// 从当前 TransportConfig 提取 CAN 波特率 (bps)
   722│ ///
   723│ /// 仅 Slcan / CandleLight 配置携带 CAN 波特率; 其他传输方式返回 None。
   724│ async fn extract_can_bitrate_from_transport(state: &AppState) -> Option<u32> {
   725│     let manager = state.transport.lock().await;
   726│     match manager.config() {
   727│         Some(vofa_next_core::TransportConfig::Slcan(s)) => Some(s.can_bitrate.bps()),
   728│         Some(vofa_next_core::TransportConfig::CandleLight(c)) => Some(c.can_bitrate.bps()),
   729│         _ => None,
   730│     }
   731│ }
   732│ 
   733│ /// 计算有效 CAN 波特率 (bps)
   734│ ///
   735│ /// - 若 `override_bps` 为 Some(n) 且 n > 0, 使用 n (手动覆盖)
   736│ /// - 否则尝试从当前 TransportConfig 读取
   737│ /// - 都没有则返回 500_000 (默认值, 避免前端传 0 导致除零)
   738│ async fn resolve_can_bitrate(state: &AppState, override_bps: Option<u32>) -> u32 {
   739│     if let Some(bps) = override_bps {
   740│         if bps > 0 {
   741│             return bps;
   742│         }
   743│     }
   744│     extract_can_bitrate_from_transport(state).await.unwrap_or(500_000)
   745│ }
   746│ 
   747│ /// 获取 CAN 负载统计快照
   748│ ///
   749│ /// `bitrate_bps`: 可选手动覆盖波特率; None/0 = 自动从 TransportConfig 读取
   750│ #[tauri::command]
   751│ pub async fn get_can_load_stats(
   752│     state: State<'_, AppState>,
   753│     bitrate_bps: Option<u32>,
   754│ ) -> Result<CanLoadSnapshot> {
   755│     let bitrate = resolve_can_bitrate(&state, bitrate_bps).await;
   756│     let stats = state.can_load_stats.lock();
   757│     Ok(stats.snapshot(bitrate))
   758│ }
   759│ 
   760│ /// 设置 CAN 负载统计滑动窗口大小 (微秒)
   761│ ///
   762│ /// 例如 1_000_000 = 1 秒, 100_000 = 100ms
   763│ #[tauri::command]
   764│ pub async fn set_can_load_window(state: State<'_, AppState>, window_us: u64) -> Result<()> {
   765│     state.can_load_stats.lock().set_window_us(window_us);
   766│     Ok(())
   767│ }
   768│ 
   769│ /// 清空 CAN 负载统计
   770│ #[tauri::command]
   771│ pub async fn clear_can_load_stats(state: State<'_, AppState>) -> Result<()> {
   772│     state.can_load_stats.lock().clear();
   773│     Ok(())
   774│ }
   775│ 
   776│ /// 订阅 CAN 负载统计推送 — 周期性推送 CanLoadSnapshot (含 history 时序数据)
   777│ ///
   778│ /// - `interval_ms`: 推送间隔 (默认 500ms)
   779│ /// - `bitrate_bps`: 可选手动覆盖波特率; None/0 = 自动从 TransportConfig 读取
   780│ /// - 每次推送前会调用 `sample_history(bitrate, now_us)` 记录一个采样点
   781│ ///
   782│ /// 取消方式: 前端调用 unsubscribe_can_load(channel_id)
   783│ ///
   784│ /// **注意**: bitrate 在订阅时一次性解析, 后续不会跟随 TransportConfig 变化;
   785│ /// 若前端修改了 CAN 波特率, 需重新订阅。
   786│ #[tauri::command]
   787│ pub async fn subscribe_can_load(
   788│     state: State<'_, AppState>,
   789│     on_event: Channel<CanLoadSnapshot>,
   790│     interval_ms: Option<u64>,
   791│     bitrate_bps: Option<u32>,
   792│ ) -> Result<()> {
   793│     let stats = state.can_load_stats.clone();
   794│     let interval = Duration::from_millis(interval_ms.unwrap_or(500));
   795│     let channel_id = on_event.id();
   796│ 
   797│     let bitrate = resolve_can_bitrate(&state, bitrate_bps).await;
   798│ 
   799│     let (cancel_tx, cancel_rx) = tokio::sync::oneshot::channel::<()>();
   800│     state.can_load_tasks.lock().insert(channel_id, cancel_tx);
   801│ 
   802│     tokio::spawn(async move {
   803│         let mut ticker = tokio::time::interval(interval);
   804│         log::info!(
   805│             "CAN 负载订阅已启动, channel_id={}, 间隔={}ms, bitrate={}bps",
   806│             channel_id,
   807│             interval.as_millis(),
   808│             bitrate
   809│         );
   810│         let mut cancel_rx = cancel_rx;
   811│         loop {
   812│             tokio::select! {
   813│                 _ = &mut cancel_rx => {
   814│                     log::info!("CAN 负载订阅被取消, channel_id={}", channel_id);
   815│                     break;
   816│                 }
   817│                 _ = ticker.tick() => {
   818│                     let snap = {
   819│                         let mut s = stats.lock();
   820│                         s.sample_history(bitrate, now_us());
   821│                         s.snapshot(bitrate)
   822│                     };
   823│                     if on_event.send(snap).is_err() {
   824│                         log::info!("CAN 负载订阅通道已关闭, channel_id={}", channel_id);
   825│                         break;
   826│                     }
   827│                 }
   828│             }
   829│         }
   830│     });
   831│ 
   832│     Ok(())
   833│ }
   834│ 
   835│ /// 取消订阅 CAN 负载统计
   836│ #[tauri::command]
   837│ pub async fn unsubscribe_can_load(state: State<'_, AppState>, channel_id: u32) -> Result<()> {
   838│     if let Some(tx) = state.can_load_tasks.lock().remove(&channel_id) {
   839│         let _ = tx.send(());
   840│     }
   841│     Ok(())
   842│ }
   843│ 
   844│ // ============ 协议输入解析 ============
   845│ 
   846│ /// 帧解码器手动测试结果 (与前端 FrameDecoderManualResult 对应)
   847│ #[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize)]
   848│ pub struct FrameDecoderManualResult {
   849│     /// 端口名 → 值 (来自 field/bitfield/length/id 块)
   850│     pub outputs: std::collections::HashMap<String, f32>,
   851│     /// 校验是否通过
   852│     pub valid: bool,
   853│     /// 本帧消耗的字节数 (header + 所有 blocks)
   854│     pub consumed_bytes: usize,
   855│     /// 错误信息 (Hex 解析失败 / 帧头未找到 / 帧不完整等)
   856│     #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
   857│     pub error: Option<String>,
   858│ }
   859│ 
   860│ /// 解析用户输入字符串为帧 (用于 FrameDecoder 手动测试模式)
   861│ ///
   862│ /// 使用 blocks 配置创建临时 FrameParser, 调用 parse_once_with_consumed
   863│ /// 返回 outputs + valid + consumed_bytes + 可选 error
   864│ #[tauri::command]
   865│ pub async fn parse_frame_decoder_input(
   866│     blocks: Vec<vofa_next_nodes::DecoderBlockDef>,
   867│     input: String,
   868│     format: InputFormat,
   869│     enable_valid: bool,
   870│     enable_frame_count: bool,
   871│     enable_last_timestamp: bool,
   872│     enable_fps: bool,
   873│ ) -> Result<FrameDecoderManualResult> {
   874│     use vofa_next_nodes::FrameParser;
   875│     use vofa_next_protocol::engine::{detect_format, parse_ascii, parse_hex};
   876│ 
   877│     // 1. 解析输入字符串为字节
   878│     let actual_format = match format {
   879│         InputFormat::Auto => detect_format(&input),
   880│         f => f,
   881│     };
   882│     let bytes = match actual_format {
   883│         InputFormat::Hex => match parse_hex(&input) {
   884│             Ok(b) => b,
   885│             Err(e) => {
   886│                 return Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
   887│                     outputs: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
   888│                     valid: false,
   889│                     consumed_bytes: 0,
   890│                     error: Some(e),
   891│                 });
   892│             }
   893│         },
   894│         InputFormat::Ascii => parse_ascii(&input),
   895│         InputFormat::Auto => unreachable!(),
   896│     };
   897│ 
   898│     // 2. 创建临时 FrameParser (无状态, 仅用于一次性解析)
   899│     let parser = FrameParser::new(
   900│         blocks,
   901│         enable_valid,
   902│         enable_frame_count,
   903│         enable_last_timestamp,
   904│         enable_fps,
   905│     );
   906│ 
   907│     // 3. 解析一帧 — 使用当前系统时间作为时间戳 (微秒)
   908│     let now_us = std::time::SystemTime::now()
   909│         .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
   910│         .map(|d| d.as_micros() as u64)
   911│         .unwrap_or(0);
   912│ 
   913│     match parser.parse_once_with_consumed(&bytes, now_us) {
   914│         Some((frame, consumed)) => Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
   915│             outputs: frame.outputs,
   916│             valid: frame.valid,
   917│             consumed_bytes: consumed,
   918│             error: None,
   919│         }),
   920│         None => Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
   921│             outputs: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
   922│             valid: false,
   923│             consumed_bytes: 0,
   924│             error: Some("无法解析: 未找到帧头或帧不完整".to_string()),
   925│         }),
   926│     }
   927│ }
   928│ 
   929│ // ============ 工具函数 ============
   930│ 
   931│ /// 获取当前 CAN 波特率 (从 TransportConfig 提取, 用于前端 UI 默认值)
   932│ ///
   933│ /// 返回 (bps, source) — source 描述来源 ("slcan" / "candle" / "default")
   934│ #[tauri::command]
   935│ pub async fn get_current_can_bitrate(state: State<'_, AppState>) -> Result<(u32, String)> {
   936│     let manager = state.transport.lock().await;
   937│     if let Some(cfg) = manager.config() {
   938│         match cfg {
   939│             vofa_next_core::TransportConfig::Slcan(s) => {
   940│                 return Ok((s.can_bitrate.bps(), "slcan".to_string()));
   941│             }
   942│             vofa_next_core::TransportConfig::CandleLight(c) => {
   943│                 return Ok((c.can_bitrate.bps(), "candle".to_string()));
   944│             }
   945│             _ => {}
   946│         }
   947│     }
   948│     Ok((500_000, "default".to_string()))
   949│ }
   950│ 
   951│ /// 导出 CAN 负载统计为 CSV 文件
   952│ ///
   953│ /// 自动保存到用户下载目录, 文件名格式: `vofa-can-load-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.csv`
   954│ ///
   955│ /// CSV 结构:

  1055│         let min = ((sec_of_day % 3600) / 60) as u32;
  1056│         let ss = (sec_of_day % 60) as u32;
  1057│         // 简化日期计算 (从 1970-01-01 开始)
  1058│         let mut year = 1970u32;
  1059│         let mut remaining_days = days as u32;
  1060│         loop {
  1061│             let leap = (year % 4 == 0 && year % 100 != 0) || (year % 400 == 0);
  1062│             let days_in_year = if leap { 366 } else { 365 };
  1063│             if remaining_days < days_in_year {
  1064│                 break;
  1065│             }
  1066│             remaining_days -= days_in_year;
  1067│             year += 1;
  1068│         }
  1069│         let leap = (year % 4 == 0 && year % 100 != 0) || (year % 400 == 0);
  1070│         let days_per_month = [31, if leap { 29 } else { 28 }, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31];
  1071│         let mut month = 1u32;
  1072│         for &dim in &days_per_month {
  1073│             if remaining_days < dim {
  1074│                 break;
  1075│             }
  1076│             remaining_days -= dim;
  1077│             month += 1;
  1078│         }
  1079│         (year, month, remaining_days + 1, hh, min, ss)
  1080│     }
  1081│ }
  1082│ 
  1083│ /// 格式化 CanLoadSnapshot 为 CSV 字符串
  1084│ fn format_can_load_csv(snap: &CanLoadSnapshot, bitrate: u32, export_time: &str) -> String {
  1085│     let mut s = String::with_capacity(8192);
  1086│     // 元信息头
  1087│     s.push_str(&format!("# VOFA-Next CAN Load Stats Export\n"));
  1088│     s.push_str(&format!("# Export Time: {}\n", export_time));
  1089│     s.push_str(&format!("# Bitrate: {} bps\n", bitrate));
  1090│     s.push_str(&format!(
  1091│         "# Window: {} us ({})\n",
  1092│         snap.window_us,
  1093│         if snap.window_us >= 1_000_000 {
  1094│             format!("{}s", snap.window_us / 1_000_000)
  1095│         } else {
  1096│             format!("{}ms", snap.window_us / 1000)
  1097│         }
  1098│     ));
  1099│     s.push_str(&format!(
  1100│         "# Summary: frames={}, total_bits={}, total_bytes={}, load_ratio={:.4}\n",
  1101│         snap.frame_count, snap.total_bits, snap.total_bytes, snap.load_ratio
  1102│     ));
  1103│     s.push('\n');
  1104│ 
  1105│     // Section: History
  1106│     s.push_str("# Section: History\n");
  1107│     s.push_str("timestamp_us,load_ratio,fps\n");
  1108│     for p in &snap.history {
  1109│         s.push_str(&format!("{},{:.6},{:.2}\n", p.timestamp, p.load_ratio, p.fps));
  1110│     }
  1111│     s.push('\n');
  1112│ 
  1113│     // Section: Per-ID
  1114│     s.push_str("# Section: Per-ID\n");
  1115│     s.push_str("id_hex,extended,frame_count,total_bits,total_bytes\n");
  1116│     for id_stat in &snap.per_id {
  1117│         s.push_str(&format!(
  1118│             "0x{:X},{},{},{},{}\n",
  1119│             id_stat.id,
  1120│             id_stat.extended,
  1121│             id_stat.frame_count,
  1122│             id_stat.total_bits,
  1123│             id_stat.total_bytes
  1124│         ));
  1125│     }
  1126│     s.push('\n');
  1127│ 
  1128│     // Section: Per-ID History
  1129│     s.push_str("# Section: Per-ID History\n");
  1130│     s.push_str("id_hex,extended,timestamp_us,load_ratio\n");
  1131│     for h in &snap.per_id_history {
  1132│         for p in &h.history {
  1133│             s.push_str(&format!(
  1134│                 "0x{:X},{},{},{:.6}\n",
  1135│                 h.id, h.extended, p.timestamp, p.load_ratio
  1136│             ));
  1137│         }
  1138│     }
  1139│ 
  1140│     s
  1141│ }
  1142│ 
  1143│ fn now_us() -> u64 {
  1144│     use std::time::{SystemTime, UNIX_EPOCH};
  1145│     SystemTime::now()
  1146│         .duration_since(UNIX_EPOCH)
  1147│         .map(|d| d.as_micros() as u64)
  1148│         .unwrap_or(0)
  1149│ }
</file>

--- a//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/commands/graph.rs
+++ b//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/commands/graph.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,132 @@
+use crate::state::{AppState, CustomInputBatch, GraphOutputSnapshot, SpectrumBatch};
+use tauri::{ipc::Channel, State};
+use vofa_next_buffer::graph::Edge;
+use vofa_next_core::Result;
+use vofa_next_nodes::NodeDef;
+
+// ============ 节点图 (后端化重构) ============
+
+/// 更新指定 tab 的节点图 (整体替换 nodes + edges)
+///
+/// 编译失败 (循环等) 返回错误, 旧图保留
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn update_tab_graph(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    tab_id: String,
+    nodes: Vec<NodeDef>,
+    edges: Vec<Edge>,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    let compiled = vofa_next_nodes::CompiledGraph::compile(tab_id.clone(), nodes, edges)
+        .map_err(|e| vofa_next_core::Error::Config(format!("{}", e)))?;
+    let mut graphs = state.graphs.lock();
+    graphs.insert(tab_id, compiled);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 移除指定 tab 的节点图 (tab 删除时调用)
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn remove_tab_graph(state: State<'_, AppState>, tab_id: String) -> Result<()> {
+    state.graphs.lock().remove(&tab_id);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 设置输入控件当前值 (Knob/Slider/Button/Radio/Checkbox 拖动时调用)
+///
+/// 该值会在下一帧 evaluate 时作为 Input 节点的输出
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn set_input_value(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    widget_id: String,
+    value: f32,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    state.input_values.lock().insert(widget_id, value);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 提交 Custom widget 的输出 (前端 iframe 调用 ctx.send 后回传)
+///
+/// 后端在下一帧 evaluate 时使用这些值作为 Custom 节点的输出
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn submit_custom_output(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    widget_id: String,
+    outputs: std::collections::HashMap<String, f32>,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    state.custom_outputs.lock().insert(widget_id, outputs);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 订阅图输出快照 — 60 FPS 推送 HashMap<widgetId, HashMap<portId, value>>
+///
+/// 前端通过单一订阅获取所有节点的实时输出值
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn subscribe_graph_outputs(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    on_event: Channel<GraphOutputSnapshot>,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    state.output_subscribers.lock().push(on_event);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 订阅 Custom widget 输入批次 — 30 FPS 推送
+///
+/// 前端收到后转发到对应 iframe
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn subscribe_custom_inputs(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    on_event: Channel<CustomInputBatch>,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    state.custom_input_subscribers.lock().push(on_event);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 订阅频谱分析结果 — 30 FPS 推送 SpectrumBatch
+///
+/// 前端 SpectrumChart 通过此订阅获取所有 SpectrumSink 节点的最新 FFT 结果。
+/// batch.spectra: HashMap<sinkWidgetId, SpectrumResult>
+/// 即使某 sink 的窗口未填满 (尚未产生新结果), 也会推送 snapshot 中的上一帧值,
+/// 保证新订阅者立即收到数据, 图表连续不闪烁。
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn subscribe_spectrum(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    on_event: Channel<SpectrumBatch>,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    state.spectrum_subscribers.lock().push(on_event);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 取消订阅图输出 — 从订阅者列表中移除指定 channel
+///
+/// 前端在取消订阅时应先调用此命令移除后端引用, 再注销 JS 端回调,
+/// 避免后端向已关闭的 channel 发送数据时产生 "Couldn't find callback id" 警告。
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn unsubscribe_graph_outputs(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    channel_id: u32,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    let mut subs = state.output_subscribers.lock();
+    subs.retain(|ch| ch.id() != channel_id);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 取消订阅 Custom 输入 — 从订阅者列表中移除指定 channel
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn unsubscribe_custom_inputs(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    channel_id: u32,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    let mut subs = state.custom_input_subscribers.lock();
+    subs.retain(|ch| ch.id() != channel_id);
+    Ok(())
+}
+
+/// 取消订阅频谱 — 从订阅者列表中移除指定 channel
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn unsubscribe_spectrum(
+    state: State<'_, AppState>,
+    channel_id: u32,
+) -> Result<()> {
+    let mut subs = state.spectrum_subscribers.lock();
+    subs.retain(|ch| ch.id() != channel_id);
+    Ok(())
+}

   292│                 ));
   293│             }
   294│         }
   295│     }

--- a//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/commands/frame_decoder.rs
+++ b//Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/commands/frame_decoder.rs
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@
+use vofa_next_core::Result;
+use vofa_next_protocol::InputFormat;
+
+/// 帧解码器手动测试结果 (与前端 FrameDecoderManualResult 对应)
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, serde::Serialize)]
+pub struct FrameDecoderManualResult {
+    /// 端口名 → 值 (来自 field/bitfield/length/id 块)
+    pub outputs: std::collections::HashMap<String, f32>,
+    /// 校验是否通过
+    pub valid: bool,
+    /// 本帧消耗的字节数 (header + 所有 blocks)
+    pub consumed_bytes: usize,
+    /// 错误信息 (Hex 解析失败 / 帧头未找到 / 帧不完整等)
+    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub error: Option<String>,
+}
+
+/// 解析用户输入字符串为帧 (用于 FrameDecoder 手动测试模式)
+///
+/// 使用 blocks 配置创建临时 FrameParser, 调用 parse_once_with_consumed
+/// 返回 outputs + valid + consumed_bytes + 可选 error
+#[tauri::command]
+pub async fn parse_frame_decoder_input(
+    blocks: Vec<vofa_next_nodes::DecoderBlockDef>,
+    input: String,
+    format: InputFormat,
+    enable_valid: bool,
+    enable_frame_count: bool,
+    enable_last_timestamp: bool,
+    enable_fps: bool,
+) -> Result<FrameDecoderManualResult> {
+    use vofa_next_nodes::FrameParser;
+    use vofa_next_protocol::engine::{detect_format, parse_ascii, parse_hex};
+
+    // 1. 解析输入字符串为字节
+    let actual_format = match format {
+        InputFormat::Auto => detect_format(&input),
+        f => f,
+    };
+    let bytes = match actual_format {
+        InputFormat::Hex => match parse_hex(&input) {
+            Ok(b) => b,
+            Err(e) => {
+                return Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
+                    outputs: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
+                    valid: false,
+                    consumed_bytes: 0,
+                    error: Some(e),
+                });
+            }
+        },
+        InputFormat::Ascii => parse_ascii(&input),
+        InputFormat::Auto => unreachable!(),
+    };
+
+    // 2. 创建临时 FrameParser (无状态, 仅用于一次性解析)
+    let parser = FrameParser::new(
+        blocks,
+        enable_valid,
+        enable_frame_count,
+        enable_last_timestamp,
+        enable_fps,
+    );
+
+    // 3. 解析一帧 — 使用当前系统时间作为时间戳 (微秒)
+    let now_us = std::time::SystemTime::now()
+        .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
+        .map(|d| d.as_micros() as u64)
+        .unwrap_or(0);
+
+    match parser.parse_once_with_consumed(&bytes, now_us) {
+        Some((frame, consumed)) => Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
+            outputs: frame.outputs,
+            valid: frame.valid,
+            consumed_bytes: consumed,
+            error: None,
+        }),
+        None => Ok(FrameDecoderManualResult {
+            outputs: std::collections::HashMap::new(),
+            valid: false,
+            consumed_bytes: 0,
+            error: Some("无法解析: 未找到帧头或帧不完整".to_string()),
+        }),
+    }
+}

### SUMMARY
Created `/Volumes/Peng/AppCode/Rust/serial+/src-tauri/src/pipeline/graph_eval.rs` by extracting two graph-evaluation functions (`evaluate_all_graphs_with` and `push_derived_from_snapshot`) from `state.rs`. The functions were changed from private (`fn`) to `pub`, received proper `use` imports (`crate::state::GraphEvalState`, `std::collections::HashMap`, `vofa_next_buffer::DataBuffer`, `vofa_next_core::DataFrame`), while the function bodies and doc comments remain byte-identical to the original. The module is already declared as `pub mod graph_eval;` in `pipeline/mod.rs`, so no module registration change was needed.

### EVIDENCE
- `state.rs:207-242` — original `evaluate_all_graphs_with` (private `fn`)
- `state.rs:252-265` — original `push_derived_from_snapshot` (private `fn`)
- `pipeline/mod.rs:11` — already declares `pub mod graph_eval;`
- `pipeline/graph_eval.rs` — created file, verified by read-back that function bodies match the source exactly, signatures are `pub`, and imports are correct

### CHANGES
- Created `src-tauri/src/pipeline/graph_eval.rs` — new file containing `pub fn evaluate_all_graphs_with` (lines 207-242 of state.rs) and `pub fn push_derived_from_snapshot` (lines 252-265 of state.rs), converted to `pub` with proper imports

### RISKS
- **Missing tests for extracted functions**: The functions are now `pub` in their own module. Existing callers in `state.rs` or `data_loop.rs` that referenced these as `crate::state::evaluate_all_graphs_with(…)` will need to be updated to `crate::pipeline::graph_eval::evaluate_all_graphs_with(…)`. This migration was not part of the assigned task and would cause compilation errors if not handled separately.
- **No compilation check performed**: The sandbox did not permit `cargo check` or `run_verifiers`. A build could fail if the callers in `state.rs` still reference these functions by their old private path. Mitigation: run `cargo check` after migrating callers.

### BLOCKERS
None.

   200│ 
   201│ /// 评估所有图 (静态函数版本, 供 GraphEvalState 使用)
   202│ ///
   203│ /// 步骤:
   204│ /// 1. 对每个图调用 evaluate (传入 filter_states + decoder_states, 逐点滤波/解码跨帧持久化)
   205│ /// 2. 合并所有图输出到 output_snapshot
   206│ /// 3. 遍历所有图的 SpectrumSink, 从 output_snapshot 取输入值, push 到对应 analyzer
   207│ fn evaluate_all_graphs_with(eval_state: &GraphEvalState, frame: &DataFrame) {
   208│     let input_values = eval_state.input_values.lock().clone();
   209│     let custom_outputs = eval_state.custom_outputs.lock().clone();
   210│     let graphs = eval_state.graphs.lock();
   211│     let mut filter_states = eval_state.filter_states.lock();
   212│     let mut decoder_states = eval_state.decoder_states.lock();
   213│ 
   214│     let mut combined: HashMap<String, HashMap<String, f32>> = HashMap::new();
   215│     for (_, graph) in graphs.iter() {
   216│         let out = graph.evaluate(frame, &input_values, &custom_outputs, &mut filter_states, &mut decoder_states);
   217│         for (k, v) in out {
   218│             combined.insert(k, v);
   219│         }
   220│     }
   221│ 
   222│     // 更新 output_snapshot (供 60 FPS ticker 推送)
   223│     {
   224│         let mut snap = eval_state.output_snapshot.lock();
   225│         snap.tick = snap.tick.wrapping_add(1);
   226│         snap.values = combined.clone();
   227│     }
   228│ 
   229│     // 收集 SpectrumSink 输入值, push 到对应 analyzer 的滑动窗口
   230│     // analyzer 的创建/删除由 spectrum_ticker 在每 tick 开头与 graphs 同步
   231│     let mut analyzers = eval_state.spectrum_analyzers.lock();
   232│     if !analyzers.is_empty() {
   233│         for (_, graph) in graphs.iter() {
   234│             let spectrum_inputs = graph.collect_spectrum_inputs(&combined);
   235│             for (sink_id, value) in spectrum_inputs {
   236│                 if let Some(analyzer) = analyzers.get_mut(&sink_id) {
   237│                     analyzer.push(value);
   238│                 }
   239│             }
   240│         }
   241│     }
   242│ }
   243│ 
   244│ /// 从 output_snapshot 收集派生值, push 到 buffer 的 derived_buffers
   245│ ///
   246│ /// 遍历所有 graph 的 edges, 对每条 edge:
   247│ ///   若 source 在 output_snapshot 中 (即 source 是有输出的节点: Math/Input/Custom/ChannelSource/FrameDecoder):
   248│ ///     取 snapshot[source][sourceHandle], push 到 buffer.derived_buffers[(target, source)]
   249│ ///
   250│ /// **时间对齐**: 本函数在每帧 evaluate_all_graphs_with 后调用,
   251│ /// 与 push_frame 同步, 保证 derived[i] 与 timestamps[i] 对齐。
   252│ fn push_derived_from_snapshot(eval_state: &GraphEvalState, buffer: &mut DataBuffer) {
   253│     let snap = eval_state.output_snapshot.lock();
   254│     let graphs = eval_state.graphs.lock();
   255│     for (_, graph) in graphs.iter() {
   256│         for e in graph.edges() {
   257│             // 只对有输出的 source (ChannelSource/Input/Math/Custom) 收集派生值
   258│             if let Some(src_out) = snap.values.get(&e.source) {
   259│                 if let Some(&val) = src_out.get(&e.source_handle) {
   260│                     buffer.push_derived(&e.target, &e.source, val);
   261│                 }
   262│             }
   263│         }
   264│     }
   265│ }
   266│ 
   267│ /// 同步 decoder_states 与 graphs 中的 FrameDecoder 节点, 并喂入新字节
   268│ ///
   269│ /// 步骤:
   270│ /// 1. 收集所有 graph 中当前的 FrameDecoder id → config (blocks + 附加端口开关)
   271│ /// 2. 删除已不存在的 decoder 对应的 parser
   272│ /// 3. 对每个 decoder:
   273│ ///    - 若 parser 不存在 → 按当前 config 创建
   274│ ///    - 若 parser 存在但 config 变了 → 重建
   275│ ///    - 调用 parser.feed(data, ts) 喂入字节, 更新 last_frame
   276│ ///
   277│ /// 由 data_loop 在每包数据上调用, 保证 parser 与图拓扑一致。
   278│ ///
   279│ /// 返回: 是否存在 FrameDecoder 节点 (供 data_loop 决定是否在 frames 为空时仍调用 evaluate)
   280│ fn feed_frame_decoders(eval_state: &GraphEvalState, data: &[u8], ts_us: u64) -> bool {
   281│     let graphs = eval_state.graphs.lock();
   282│     let mut decoder_states = eval_state.decoder_states.lock();
   283│ 
   284│     // 收集所有 graph 中当前的 FrameDecoder id → config
   285│     let mut current_configs: HashMap<String, (Vec<vofa_next_nodes::DecoderBlockDef>, bool, bool, bool, bool)> = HashMap::new();
   286│     for (_, graph) in graphs.iter() {
   287│         for dec_id in graph.decoder_node_ids() {
   288│             if let Some(cfg) = graph.decoder_config(&dec_id) {
   289│                 current_configs.insert(dec_id, (
   290│                     cfg.0.to_vec(),
   291│                     cfg.1, cfg.2, cfg.3, cfg.4,
   292│                 ));
   293│             }
   294│         }
   295│     }
   296│ 
   297│     // 删除已不存在的 decoder 对应的 parser
   298│     decoder_states.retain(|id, _| current_configs.contains_key(id));
   299│
